questions.prompt: A user reports a block, but you don't see a request in the Response Center. Where do you look next?
questions.explanation: The Unified Audit logs every Permit, Deny, and Ringfenced action across modules. The Response Center only shows requests waiting on you; if no request was generated, the Audit is where the policy match landed.

questions.prompt: Before clicking Approve on a request, you should confirm the organisation in the portal header matches the customer the request belongs to.
questions.explanation: Approving in the wrong tenant is the costliest helpdesk mistake on this product. The header is the canonical check; tab-switching can land you in a different org than you expect.
